dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It was a serialized web novel that no one seemed to read: Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: Why doesn't anyone read this? It is a masterpiece!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Then again, who would read a web novel that has over 3,000 episodes?

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: I'm the only reader and it even took me ten years to get to the last episode.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Back then, I had no idea.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: On the day I finished the web novel...

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: I know how this story goes.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The story I had been reading alone for the past ten years turned into reality.

dialogue.speaker: Kim Dokja
dialogue.line: I can't believe it is the final episode. I'm too nervous to even open it.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: ...became the only person who knew how the world was going to end: Omniscient Reader.

summary: The protagonist, Kim Dokja, is the sole reader of a 3,149-episode web novel called "Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse." After ten years, he finishes the novel, only for its fictional world to become reality, leaving him as the only one who knows its future.
